# ShadowEdge Managed IT Services

> ShadowEdge is a managed IT services provider (MSP) delivering managed IT support, cybersecurity, cloud and network engineering, migration and backup, VoIP, and IT consulting to growing businesses across Northern California and the San Francisco Bay Area. Phone: 916-760-4884. Email: support@shadowedge.tech.

## Company
- [Homepage](https://shadowedge.tech/): Overview of ShadowEdge's managed IT and cybersecurity services.
- [About](https://shadowedge.tech/about): Company background, approach, and team experience.
- [Contact](https://shadowedge.tech/contact): Phone, email, and contact form for consultations and quotes.

## Services
- [All Services](https://shadowedge.tech/services): Overview of every service offered.
- [Managed IT Support](https://shadowedge.tech/service-managed-it-support): Help desk, endpoint management, and business technology oversight.
- [Cybersecurity](https://shadowedge.tech/service-cybersecurity): Threat monitoring, endpoint protection, and security policy.
- [Cloud & Network Engineering](https://shadowedge.tech/service-cloud-network): Cloud architecture, network design, and secure connectivity.
- [Migration & Backup](https://shadowedge.tech/service-migration-backup): Planned migrations and backup strategies for continuity.
- [Network Management](https://shadowedge.tech/service-network-management): Network performance monitoring and optimization.
- [VoIP & Unified Communications](https://shadowedge.tech/service-voip-uc): Voice and collaboration services.
- [IT Consulting / vCIO](https://shadowedge.tech/service-it-consulting): Fractional executive-level IT planning and roadmap development.
- [Compliance](https://shadowedge.tech/service-compliance): HIPAA and PCI-aligned security and documentation support.

## Locations
- [All Locations](https://shadowedge.tech/locations): Overview of the service area.
- [Northern California](https://shadowedge.tech/location-northern-ca)
- [Sacramento, CA](https://shadowedge.tech/location-sacramento-ca)
- [Rocklin, Roseville & Granite Bay, CA](https://shadowedge.tech/location-rocklin-roseville)
- [Folsom & Elk Grove, CA](https://shadowedge.tech/location-folsom-elk-grove)
- [Bay Area, CA](https://shadowedge.tech/location-bay-area)

## Industries
- [All Industries](https://shadowedge.tech/industries): Overview of every industry served.
- [Healthcare](https://shadowedge.tech/industry-healthcare): HIPAA-aligned security controls, device management, and support for clinical and administrative teams.
- [Finance](https://shadowedge.tech/industry-finance): PCI-aligned security practices and dependable infrastructure for financial data.
- [Legal](https://shadowedge.tech/industry-legal): Confidentiality-focused IT support and secure document workflows for legal teams.
- [Professional Services](https://shadowedge.tech/industry-professional-services): Scalable support and cloud infrastructure for consulting, accounting, and client-facing firms.
- [Nonprofit](https://shadowedge.tech/industry-nonprofit): Cost-conscious managed IT and cybersecurity for mission-driven organizations.
- [Manufacturing](https://shadowedge.tech/industry-manufacturing): Network reliability, security, and technology planning for connected facilities.
- [Automotive Dealerships](https://shadowedge.tech/industry-automotive-dealerships): Secure IT for DMS platforms, multi-location connectivity, and customer data.
- [Education](https://shadowedge.tech/industry-education): Budget-conscious IT support and security for schools and educational organizations.

## Blog
<!-- BLOG-LINKS-START -->
          - [How to Answer Cyber Insurance Renewal Questions](https://shadowedge.tech/blog/how-to-answer-cyber-insurance-renewal-questions): Cyber insurance applications have grown longer because of specific claim trends from 2023 and 2024, including the MOVEit supply-chain breach, the Change Healthcare ransomware incident, and the Arup deepfake wire fraud. Each new section asks about specific security controls including immutable backups, layered MFA, callback verification on wires, EDR or MDR coverage, vendor risk, and tested incident response. Answers that overstate your security posture can trigger rescission after a claim, meaning the policy is treated as if it never existed.
          <!-- BLOG-LINKS-END -->

- [Resources](https://shadowedge.tech/resources): IT insights and guidance for business leaders.
